ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Once a project is mastered, personalize the project by creating your own original patterns.
[ ] Term-Specific Gift Ideas: Back to school, Christmas, pastor appreciation (Oct.), welcome to the neighborhood, etc.
[ ] Anytime Gifts: children's hospital, missionary work, military care packages, nursing homes.
